footer.tagline: Furniture made for how you live.
footer.ctaBody: Tell us about your home and what you're hoping to design — we'll take it from there.

hero.title: Furniture designed around how you actually live.
hero.subtitle: Custom and semi-custom furniture design for Vietnamese homes, with interior, architectural, and landscape design available alongside it. Want it installed? We'll handle that too.
hero.imageAlt: Glass and timber home glowing warmly at dusk, surrounded by forest

about.title: Furniture-first, designed around your home
about.body: Skog Mộc by TNP designs bespoke and semi-custom furniture, resolved alongside your interior so the pieces and the room are considered together — not furnished afterward. We also offer interior, architectural, and landscape design for projects that need them, and we'll install your furniture for you if you'd rather not handle that yourself.
about.point1: Furniture design is what we do best
about.point2: Vietnamese climate and lot conditions inform every piece
about.point3: Installation available, if you want it handled for you
about.point4: Interior, architectural, and landscape design available alongside

statement.title:
Craft
Shaping
How You Live
statement.body: Our expertise is furniture, told through how you actually live. We design pieces that fit your space and your routine — not furniture chosen to fill a room.
statement.lead: Every piece is made for a real home in Vietnam — not a showroom.

formula.title:
Design It.
Installed.
formula.note: Designed for Vietnamese homes — tropical climate, narrow urban lots, and multi-generational households, not generic floor plans.

services.title: What we design
services.lead: Furniture first — the easiest place to start — with interior, architectural, and landscape design available alongside it.

process.title: How a project unfolds
process.lead: From first consultation to handover, in four phases.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.body: We learn your household, your site, and your budget before drawing anything.

step2.title: Concept design
step2.body: Initial spatial and material direction, presented for your feedback.

step3.title: Development & documentation
step3.body: Concept resolved into a fabrication-ready drawing and specification set.

step4.title: Handover
step4.body: Documentation and specifications delivered to you, with installation available if you'd like it handled for you.

installation.title: Design it. Install it. Done.
installation.body: Most clients start with furniture. If you'd rather not handle delivery and setup yourself, we'll install your pieces for you — just say so when you reach out.

portfolio.title: Recent work
portfolio.lead: A look at the kind of projects we design.
portfolio.honestNote: We're building our public portfolio. Real projects, with the client's permission, will appear here soon.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.body: Tell us about your home, your site, and what you're hoping to design.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Furniture design is what we do best — with interior, architectural, and landscape design, plus a wider network of specialists, available when a project calls for them.

furniture.title: Furniture Design
furniture.body: Bespoke and semi-custom pieces, designed around your space and how you live in it. Installation available, if you want it handled for you.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.body: Spatial planning, material and finish selection, lighting, and joinery detailing.

architecture.title: Architectural Design
architecture.body: Concept design and documentation for houses, townhouses, and additions.

landscape.title: Landscape Design
landscape.body: Gardens, courtyards, rooftop greenery, and the transition from house to street.

installation.title: Furniture installation
installation.body: If you'd rather not handle delivery and setup yourself, we'll install your furniture for you — just let us know when you reach out.

extended.title: Extended specialist services
extended.lead: Available when a project needs them, via our professional network — not part of our everyday core work.

items.title: Architectural Technologist
items.body: Detailed technical drawings and code compliance once a design is locked in.

items.title: Interior & Spatial Designer
items.body: A second perspective on space planning for layouts that need extra care.

items.title: Building Surveyor
items.body: A condition survey of the existing structure before a renovation begins.

items.title: Town Planner
items.body: Guidance through zoning rules and local planning questions.

items.title: Production Designer
items.body: Spatial design for film, photography, or event productions.

items.title: Historic Buildings Inspector
items.body: Heritage assessment for renovations inside a protected zone.

items.title: Structural Engineer
items.body: Structural calculations for load-bearing walls and additions.

extended.note: Available as needed, via our network.

hero.title: Pricing
hero.subtitle: Design package tiers by service depth. Every project gets a custom quote based on scope.

consult.name: Design Consultation
consult.description: An initial consultation to discuss your project, site, and goals before committing to a full design package.

design.name: Full Design Package
design.description: Concept through fabrication-ready specifications across the disciplines your project needs.

fullService.name: Design + Installation
fullService.description: Full design package plus delivery and installation of your furniture.

comparison.title: Compare packages
comparison.note: Exact deliverables are confirmed with you during consultation.

q1.question: Does Skog Mộc by TNP install the furniture, or only design it?
q1.answer: We design first — furniture is what we do best, alongside interior, architectural, and landscape design when a project calls for them. Installation is available too: if you'd rather not handle delivery and setup yourself, just let us know and we'll take care of it.

q2.question: What if I already have my own installer or fabricator?
q2.answer: That's fine — many clients do. We design to a level of detail any competent installer or fabricator can work from, and we're happy to coordinate with your chosen team if you want that handoff support; it's not required.

q3.question: Do you only design furniture, or also full interiors?
q3.answer: Both. Furniture is our core focus, designed alongside an interior scheme when one's needed. Renovation and addition projects typically need an initial site survey before concept design begins.

q4.question: What's included in a full design package?
q4.answer: Deliverables vary by project — we'll confirm the exact set (concept drawings, visualisations, material specification, fabrication-ready drawings, and furniture layout) with you during consultation.

q5.question: How long does the design process take?
q5.answer: Timelines vary by project scope and scale. See our Process page for a phase breakdown; we'll give you a realistic estimate during consultation.

q6.question: What materials and finishes do you work with?
q6.answer: Material and finish choices are confirmed for each piece based on durability, budget, and the Vietnamese climate — we'll walk you through options during consultation.

q7.question: What areas of Vietnam do you work in?
q7.answer: Contact us with your project location and we'll confirm whether it's within our current service area.

q8.question: Can you bring in a structural engineer, town planner, or other specialist if my project needs one?
q8.answer: Yes — beyond our four core design disciplines, we have access to a network of additional specialists and bring the right one in when a project calls for it.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what information we collect and how we use it.

s01.heading: What we collect
s01.body: When you submit our project inquiry or professional inquiry form, we collect your name, email, phone number (optional), and project or collaboration details. We use this solely to respond to your enquiry and discuss your project. We do not collect data automatically through cookies beyond a single functional preference cookie for the language banner.

s02.heading: How we use your data
s02.body: Your contact details are used to respond to your inquiry, schedule a consultation, and follow up if you haven't received a response. We do not use your data for unsolicited marketing. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties except where required by law.

s03.heading: Data storage
s03.body: Form submissions are processed via Formspree (formspree.io), a third-party form service. Formspree's privacy policy governs data processed on their platform. We retain your enquiry details for as long as necessary to fulfil your request or as required by Vietnamese law.

s04.heading: Cookies
s04.body: This website uses a single functional cookie to remember your language or privacy banner preference. No tracking cookies, advertising pixels, or analytics scripts are used. We do not use Google Analytics or any third-party tracking services.

s05.heading: Your rights
s05.body: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, email thuy@tnpgr.vn. We will respond within 30 days.

s06.heading: Contact us
s06.body: For privacy questions: thuy@tnpgr.vn · +84 90 333 37 29 · Lô 35 đường số 9, KCN Tam Phước, Biên Hòa, Vietnam
